jobs.title: Senior React Developer
jobs.description: We are seeking a Senior React Developer to join our internal digital transformation team. You will lead the migration of legacy intranet portals to modern React-based systems and mentor junior web engineers.
requirements: 4+ years of professional React and TypeScript development experience.
Deep understanding of modern state management (Zustand, React Context, Redux Toolkit).
Experience in optimizing micro-frontends and build performance via Vite.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills with cross-functional teams.
benefits: Flexible working hours and 2 days hybrid option.

jobs.title: FinTech Financial Analyst
jobs.description: Apex Capital is expanding its risk assessment team. We are looking for an experienced Analyst to review digital micro-lending profiles, evaluate group financial risks, and prepare board compliance reports.
requirements: Graduate or Postgraduate in Finance, Business, or related fields (CFA is a major plus).
2+ years of experience in credit risk modeling or financial analysts roles in retail banking.
Expertise in Excel modeling, SQL-based ledger querying, or Tableau dashboards.
Ability to make data-driven decisions under fast corporate timelines.
benefits: Ongoing certifications budget coverage (up to ৳50,000 per year).

jobs.title: Corporate Talent Acquisition Specialist
jobs.description: Join our Strategic HR cell at Rangpur Group Headquarters. You will drive group-wide internal hiring, design professional onboarding flows, and run employer branding and employee engagement programs.
requirements: BBA/MBA in Human Resource Management (HRM).
Minimum 2 years of corporate recruiting experience (technical recruiting is a plus).
Strong familiarity with modern Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS) and job portals.
Warm interpersonal skills with a strong command of professional English.
benefits: Performance incentives on prompt talent placements.
Full medical and OPD corporate discount scheme.
Gratuity and provident fund subscription options.

jobs.title: Lead UI/UX Designer
jobs.description: A designer-centric role spearheading beautiful user-experience layouts for Apex Digital's public applications. Build design systems, run prototype sessions, and review visual guidelines.
requirements: 3+ years of professional full-time digital UX/UI design experience.
A staggering design portfolio showcasing responsive layout mastery, elegant typography, and strict user hierarchies.
Advanced proficiency in Figma components, auto-layouts, and prototyping structures.
Solid design ethics focusing on high-contrast accessibility and beautiful responsive grids.
benefits: Full remote freedom with core collaboration hours (11 AM to 4 PM).
Premium subscription budgets for UI kits, software tools, and digital books.

jobs.title: Logistics & Supply Chain Lead
jobs.description: Supervise bulk shipping logistics operations at the Chittagong port terminal. Ensure optimal route scheduling, manage customs documentation clearance, and automate freight tracking logs.
requirements: Bachelor's degree in Industrial Engineering, supply chain management, or related technical disciplines.
3+ years experience managing dry bulk logistics or warehouse setups.
Excellent leadership abilities with dynamic conflict resolution skills.
Technical proficiency in automated route scheduling dashboards.
benefits: Daily field transit allowances and vehicle facility.

applications.cvContent:
Sadat Rahman - Frontend Developer
Email: sadat.react@apex-digital.com
Skills: React, Redux, JavaScript, CSS, HTML, Web Optimization
Experience:
- 2.5 years as Frontend Dev at Apex Digital
- Implemented responsive dashboards for client portals.
applications.coverLetter: Hello, I have been working as an internal Frontend Software Engineer at Apex Digital for over 2 years now. I'm highly passionate about modernizing our React architecture and taking on more leadership duties as a Senior React Developer.
applications.adminNotes: Solid performance rating in his current role. Has high familiarity with internal codebases. Schedule a technical interview.
applications.aiAnalysis: Candidate has 2.5 years of experience directly in React/Frontend inside Apex. Possesses strong UI/UX frontend skills. Meets all foundational requirements; lacks the full 4 years of experience but makes up for it with high internal context.

applications.cvContent:
Nusrat Jahan
Email: nusrat.hr@apex-digital.com
Skills: Recruiting, employee relations, onboarding, ATS systems
Experience: 1.5 Years as HR Assistant in Apex Digital.
applications.coverLetter: I have been supporting strategic recruitment events over the last 12 months. This TA role aligns perfectly with my professional goals of orchestrating Rangpur Group's national hiring plans.
applications.adminNotes: Initial screening looks promising. Good communication skills noted by her current director.
applications.aiAnalysis: Candidate possesses good recruiting administration skills and has hands-on familiarity with HR setups. Might need guidance on strategic tech sourcing but remains an excellent internal progression candidate.

notifications.message: Your application for Senior React Developer has been moved to 'Screening'.
